    S

    save(List) - Static method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.logic.DataStorage
    Saves the list of workouts to a binary file using Java serialization.
    saveButton - Variable in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.WorkoutToolBar
    Button requesting a save.
    serialVersionUID - Static variable in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.model.Workout
    Version identifier for serialization.
    setBorders() - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.InputFormPanel
    Adds a titled border around the form.
    setCardio(boolean) - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.WorkoutFormEvent
    Sets the cardio flag.
    setCardio(boolean) - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.model.Workout
    Sets the cardio flag.
    setDay(String) - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.WorkoutFormEvent
    Sets the day of the week.
    setDayOfWeek(String) - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.model.Workout
    Sets the day of the week.
    setDuration(String) - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.WorkoutFormEvent
    Sets the duration text.
    setDurationMinutes(int) - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.model.Workout
    Sets the workout duration in minutes.
    setExerciseName(String) - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.WorkoutFormEvent
    Sets the exercise name.
    setExerciseName(String) - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.model.Workout
    Sets the exercise name.
    setFormListener(WorkoutFormListener) - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.InputFormPanel
    Registers the listener that will be notified about form events.
    setIntensity(Intensity) - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.WorkoutFormEvent
    Sets the intensity level.
    setIntensity(Intensity) - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.model.Workout
    Sets the intensity level.
    setListListener(WorkoutListListener) - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.WorkoutListPanel
    Registers the listener notified about delete requests.
    setNote(String) - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.WorkoutFormEvent
    Sets the note text.
    setNote(String) - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.model.Workout
    Sets the optional note.
    setStrength(boolean) - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.WorkoutFormEvent
    Sets the strength flag.
    setStrength(boolean) - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.model.Workout
    Sets the strength flag.
    setToolBarListener(ToolBarListener) - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.WorkoutToolBar
    Registers the listener notified about toolbar commands.
    showError(String, String) - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.MainWindow
    Shows an error / warning dialog.
    showInfo(String, String) - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.MainWindow
    Shows an information dialog.
    showStats(int, int, int, int) - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.WorkoutListPanel
    Updates the statistics labels with the given values.
    showWorkouts(List) - Method in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.WorkoutListPanel
    Replaces the displayed list with the given workouts.
    strength - Variable in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.WorkoutFormEvent
    Whether the "Strength" box was checked.
    strength - Variable in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.model.Workout
    True if this workout includes a strength component.
    strengthCheckBox - Variable in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.InputFormPanel
    Checkbox marking the workout as strength.
    strengthCountLabel - Variable in class hr.unizd.workoutlog.gui.WorkoutListPanel
    Label showing the number of strength workouts.
